# esc button — Freelance Web Studio

## What is esc button?

esc button is an affordable Indian freelance web design and development studio. We design and build professional websites, landing pages, and digital products for startups, small businesses, salons, yoga studios, e-commerce stores, and local businesses across India.

## Who we help

- Small business owners across India (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Kolkata, Jaipur, etc.)
- Startups and solopreneurs who need a website quickly and cheaply
- Service businesses like salons, yoga studios, tailors, studios, libraries
- E-commerce brands that need a clean, fast online store
- Anyone with an idea who needs digital help without expensive agency prices

## What we do

1. **Web Design** – Modern, clean, mobile-responsive UI/UX design
2. **Web Development** – Fast websites with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS
3. **Digital Help** – Domain setup, hosting, deployment, SEO basics, bug fixes

## Our approach (Indian Jugaad Style)

We believe in smart, practical solutions. No unnecessary complexity. No bloated code. We build lean, fast, effective websites that do the job — delivered quickly and priced honestly for Indian budgets.

## Pricing

Budget-friendly pricing starting from under ₹5,000. We work with clients across all budgets, offering transparent, no-surprise quotes.

## Contact

- Email: 2005aryankumar333@gmail.com
- Response time: < 24 hours
- Location: India (working with clients pan-India and globally)

## Live Projects

- Indoshree (https://indoshree.com) — E-commerce website
- DropPurity (https://droppurity.com) — Product landing page
- Zial Hair Studio (https://zialport.vercel.app) — Salon website
- Ankhaae (https://ankhaae.vercel.app) — Mental wellness website
- Liba Library (https://liba-snowy.vercel.app) — Library website
- Sui Dhaga (https://sui-dhaga-ras1.vercel.app) — Tailor website
- Smriti Yoga (https://smritiyoga.vercel.app) — Yoga studio website
- Rose Studio (https://rosestudio.vercel.app) — Photography studio website
- TaskiMate (https://taskimatezz.vercel.app) — Productivity app

## Technologies

Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Figma, Vercel, MongoDB
